issues.description: Action GiveDon missing 'rest' parameter. Card text specifies 'rest it' after adding DON!!. Should include rest:true or equivalent.

SearchDeck filter incomplete. Text specifies 'look at 5 cards from top' and 'reveal up to 1 {Donquixote Pirates} type card'. Filter should reflect type-based search, not ByName. Also missing logic for placing rest at bottom in any order.
Missing action for deck manipulation: 'place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order' is not represented in DSL.
